ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the provided financial document:  This document confirms Moksh Ornaments Ltd.'s compliance with SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. Their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, Bigshare Services, reported that the regulation is not applicable to the company as all of its shares are entirely in dematerialized form. No dematerialization or rematerialization requests were received during the quarter, indicating efficient and fully electronic shareholding practices with no material impacts or red flags.
